summary: Completed E2E testing of BeeBark social networking app. All core features working - Login, Connections Search (name/username/email), Connection Requests, Feed, Jobs, Meetings, Chat. Fixed route ordering bug in jobs API.

minor.issue: No /api/messages/conversations endpoint exists - Chat page uses /api/connections/list instead

ui_bugs.issue: /messages URL returns blank page - route is /chat not /messages

action_items: Consider adding redirect from /messages to /chat for better UX (optional)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Route ordering bug in /app/backend/routes/job.js - /recommended route was defined after /:jobId causing 520 error
AI job matching uses basic keyword matching algorithm (MOCKED - not LLM-powered as mentioned in requirements)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, one route naming inconsistency)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and passing. Frontend pages tested: Login, Dashboard, Connections (with search), Feed, Jobs, Meetings, Chat. Connection search works by name/username/email. Username auto-generation from email during registration verified.

features_verified.User Login: PASS - Test user can login with credentials
features_verified.Connection Search API: PASS - Search works by name, username, email
features_verified.Send Connection Request: PASS - Request sent and UI updated
features_verified.Connections page UI: PASS - Search bar, tabs, results all working
features_verified.Jobs page - browse jobs: PASS - Browse, Recommended, Applications tabs work
features_verified.Meetings page: PASS - Start, Schedule, Join meeting UI working
features_verified.Chat page: PASS - Shows connections, select to chat interface

mocked_apis.AI job matching: Uses basic keyword matching, not LLM-powered
